# meshstack_api_key (Resource)

Manages a meshStack API key.

The API key token is returned in `status.token` after creation and after updates that rotate the secret (e.g. changing `expires_at`). It is stored (sensitive) in the Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "meshstack_api_key" "example" {
  workspace_identifier = "my-workspace"
  display_name         = "ci-key"
  authorities          = ["LANDINGZONE_LIST", "PROJECT_LIST"]
  expires_at           = "2025-12-31"
}

# The token is only available after creation or after secret rotation (expires_at change).
# It is stored (sensitive) in state and cannot be retrieved again from the API.
output "api_key_token" {
  value     = meshstack_api_key.example.token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `authorities` (List of String) Authorities (permission shortcodes) assigned to the API key. Valid values: `BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_DELETE`, `BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_LIST`, `BUILDINGBLOCKDEFINITION_SAVE`, `BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_DELETE`, `BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_LIST`, `BUILDINGBLOCKRUNNER_SAVE`, `BUILDINGBLOCK_DELETE`, `BUILDINGBLOCK_LIST`, `BUILDINGBLOCK_SAVE`, `COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_DELETE`, `COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_LIST`, `COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_SAVE`, `COMMUNICATION_DELETE`, `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCKRUNSOURCE_SAVE`, `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_DELETE`, `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_LIST`, `ADM_BUILDINGBLOCK_SAVE`, `ADM_COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_DELETE`, `ADM_COMMUNICATIONDEFINITION_LIST`, `ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_DELETE`, `ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_LIST`, `ADM_PLATFORMINSTANCE_SAVE`, `ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_DELETE`, `ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_LIST`, `ADM_PROJECTPRINCIPALROLE_SAVE`, `ADM_PROJECTROLE_DELETE`, `ADM_PROJECTROLE_SAVE`, `ADM_PROJECT_DELETE`, `ADM_PROJECT_LIST`, `ADM_PROJECT_SAVE`, `ADM_REVIEW_PUBLICATION`, `ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_DELETE`, `ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_LIST`, `ADM_SERVICEINSTANCE_SAVE`, `ADM_TAGDEFINITION_DELETE`, `ADM_TAGDEFINITION_LIST`, `ADM_TAGDEFINITION_SAVE`, `ADM_TENANT_DELETE`, `ADM_TENANT_LIST`, `ADM_TENANT_SAVE`, `ADM_TFSTATE_DELETE`, `ADM_TFSTATE_LIST`, `ADM_TFSTATE_SAVE`, `ADM_USER_DELETE`, `ADM_USER_LIST`, `ADM_USER_SAVE`, `ADM_WORKSPACE_DELETE`, `ADM_WORKSPACE_LIST`, `ADM_WORKSPACE_SAVE`, `ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_DELETE`, `ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_LIST`, `ADM_WORKSPACEPRINCIPALBINDING_SAVE`, `ADM_WORKSPACEUSERGROUP_LIST` (admin-scoped).
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the API key.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiry date of the API key (ISO date, e.g. `2025-12-31`). Changing this rotates the secret and a new token is returned.
- `workspace_identifier` (String) Identifier of the workspace that owns the API key.

### Read-Only

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Secret token of the API key. Available after creation and after secret rotation (when `expires_at` changes).
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the API key (Keycloak clientId).
